title: Arduino thermistor temperature read
prompt: On an Arduino Uno (ATmega328) I want to measure temperature with a 10k NTC thermistor. Wire the thermistor and a fixed resistor as a divider off the 5 V rail so the junction feeds an analog input, and have the sketch read it. Assume room temperature (25 C) for the bench check.

abstraction.reason: the thermistor is a #105 behavioral parameterized resistor (R at the tested temperature), not a datasheet thermal SPICE model
